name: Capped Out Labs
description: AI transformation firm that builds custom AI into how companies run. Production systems, not strategy decks.
capabilities: AI Revenue Sprint — $15K, 2 weeks: AI readiness audit plus the highest-leverage workflow built live
AI Revenue Infrastructure — $50K to $150K, 6 to 10 weeks: 3 to 5 core workflows rebuilt with AI across departments
Full AI Transformation — $200K to $500K+, 3 to 6 months: full infrastructure rebuild with AI agents across all departments
Equity / Rev-Share — no upfront cost: 3 to 10% equity or 10 to 20% revenue share on incremental lift
audience: Business operators doing $250K+ in annual revenue
